steps.title: Name the shared pattern
steps.content: The text first describes Maya Thomas, then says she is not the only Indigenous writer to blend traditional stories with popular literature. It then gives Nora Cardinal as a second example of that same blend.

steps.title: Reject claims not in the text
steps.content: Choice B invents advice for younger authors. Choice C claims a comparison about memorability that never appears. Choice D invents a success comparison between the two writers. The answer is A.
